title: Batch B: Inconsistent Hook Behavior in gate-blocker.cjs

bugs.title: Phase index bounds not validated
bugs.root_cause: No bounds checking on phaseIndex and no array validation on workflowPhases before indexing

acceptance_criteria.description: Empty workflowPhases array skips sequence validation
Valid combinations work as before (no regression)

bugs.title: Empty workflows object prevents fallback loading
bugs.root_cause: Truthy empty object {} bypasses || fallback chain

acceptance_criteria.description: ctx.workflows with valid .workflows sub-object is used directly
Valid ctx.workflows with .workflows is used directly
All sources failing results in graceful skip

bugs.title: Supervised review doesn't coordinate with gate-blocker
bugs.root_cause: Gate-blocker explicitly ignores supervised review status, allowing advancement during review

acceptance_criteria.description: Block message includes supervised review and phase
Rejected status blocks with rejection message
Supervised review check is early exit (before iteration reqs)

nfr.description: TDD with test coverage for each fix (Article II)
